key_metrics_output: microplastic count, polymer type identification, recovery rate, contamination control
abstract: A protocol for extracting and analyzing microplastics from freshwater, sediment, and fish digestive system samples. The method includes water collection via manta nets, sediment sampling with benthic grabs, fish dissection, chemical digestion, density separation, vacuum filtration, microscopic enumeration, and polymer identification using μ-Raman spectroscopy, with quality control steps to ensure high recovery and minimize contamination.

key_metrics_output: Quality control steps ensure high recovery and minimize contamination
abstract: protocol for extracting microplastics from freshwater, sediment, and fish digestive system samples
chemical digestion, density separation, vacuum filtration, and microscopic enumeration, followed by polymer identification using μ-Raman spectroscopy
